summary: Script itself is well-written (type hints, immutable dataclass, informative errors, pure functions, set -euo pipefail in bash). Critical failures: (1) Workflow runs pytest directly instead of invoking `act push` per task requirement. (2) No test harness that creates temp repos, runs act for each case, captures to act-result.txt—this infrastructure is entirely missing. (3) Test file `test_secret_rotation.py` referenced in workflow (line: pytest test_secret_rotation.py) is absent; workflow will fail. (4) TDD requirement ('write failing test first') unverifiable. (5) No act-result.txt artifact generation. Task explicitly mandated 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' and 'act-result.txt file MUST exist when done.' Deliverable incomplete.
